title: CNBC Daily Open: Strait of Hormuz, Ukraine's attacks in Russia, Greenland
summary_full: Geopolitics are back in focus, with the U.S. retaliating against Iran after several ships were struck in the Strait of Hormuz, and Ukraine hitting Russia.
summary_public: Geopolitics are back in focus, with the U.S. retaliating against Iran after several ships were struck in the Strait of Hormuz, and Ukraine hitting Russia.
